data.title: Analysis: SOL/ETH pair breaks below multi-month rising wedge pattern, signaling a 40% drop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The market shows that as of May 29, the SOL/ETH trading pair has fallen below its rising wedge pattern that has lasted for several months. This bearish structure usually foreshadows a sharp decline. From a technical perspective, a breakout of a rising wedge typically results in a decline equal to the maximum height of the pattern. In addition, Meme coin activity on the Solana chain has cooled significantly. For example, the average daily revenue of the Meme coin launch platform Pump.fun has dropped sharply since early April and is close to the annual low. Standard Chartered Bank previously warned in a report that if Solana fails to expand its application ecosystem beyond Meme coins, it may perform poorly amid intensified competition in Ethereum Layer 2, while analyst Alex Clay predicts that the so-called "Ethereum strong period" has arrived, further supporting expectations of a SOL/ETH decline. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: BNB Chain Unveils Exclusive Incentive Program to Accelerate Real-World Asset (RWA) Adoption
data.description: BNB Chain has announced a new exclusive incentive program to support the growth of Real-World Asset (RWA) projects in the Web3 space. The initiative opens applications starting May 29, 2025, offering a suite of resources designed to help RWA builders scale, grow liquidity, and onboard new users.Program Overview: Fueling the RWA Movement on BNB ChainThe newly launched BNB Chain RWA Exclusive Incentive Program aims to support both new and existing RWA projects seeking to build or migrate to the BNB Chain ecosystem. It aligns with growing industry trends connecting traditional finance (TradFi) assets with decentralized infrastructure.Key support includes:Technical and Compliance GuidanceLiquidity Seeding and TVL IncentivesGrowth-Focused Funding and Marketing SupportCustomized Roadmaps for Scalability and AdoptionThe program is open to all RWA projects, regardless of sub-sector or development stage. While market cap and traction are considered for mature teams, BNB Chain also welcomes early-stage initiatives that demonstrate unique potential.How to Apply and Maximize Selection ChancesProjects interested in participating are encouraged to submit applications immediately. There is no set deadline, and the BNB Chain team will conduct ongoing evaluations.To enhance visibility and transparency, projects are recommended to integrate with DeFiLlama. This will offer the community a clearer picture of project fundamentals and on-chain performance.Selected projects will receive dedicated support from the BNB Chain team. Importantly, projects not selected initially will still remain eligible for future consideration.Why BNB Chain Is Ideal for RWA ProjectsBNB Chain offers an infrastructure optimized for RWA innovation:High Performance: Up to 2,000 TPS on BSC and 4,000+ TPS via Layer 2 opBNBLow Fees: Average transaction fee of just $0.01Massive Reach: Over 562 million unique addresses and 10 million daily active usersThriving Ecosystem: 5,000+ dApps across DeFi, stablecoins, NFTs, and moreWith a DeFi TVL exceeding $10.7 billion and stablecoin market caps surpassing $10 billion, the BNB Chain ecosystem provides unmatched exposure and scalability for RWA developers.Building the Bridge Between Crypto and the Real WorldBNB Chain’s new RWA track marks a bold step in bringing tokenized real-world assets into mainstream adoption. The team believes RWA projects will play a crucial role in bridging traditional and decentralized finance, ultimately bringing the next billion users into Web3.

data.title: Fosun Wealth and Vaulta collaborate to support Hong Kong blockchain infrastructure
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Vaulta and Fosun Wealth Holdings have partnered to support the blockchain infrastructure of Hong Kong's financial industry. Vaulta will provide its BankingOS suite and exSat digital banking platform for asset issuance, revenue generation and crypto payments, while Fosun Wealth will provide financial licenses and physical asset issuance capabilities. (CoinDesk)

data.title: China Oil Capital Maintains Distance from Stablecoin Ventures
data.description: According to PANews, China Oil Capital has announced on its interactive platform that it is currently not involved in any stablecoin-related business activities. The company emphasized its commitment to monitoring and researching policy developments in this area. It intends to conduct its operations lawfully, prudently, and steadily.

data.title: Bybit obtains Austrian MiCAR license and establishes European headquarters in Vienna
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Crypto exchange Bybit announced that it has officially obtained the MiCAR license issued by the Austrian Financial Supervisory Authority (FMA) and established its European headquarters in Vienna as a compliance hub for its services in the 29 countries of the European Economic Area (EEA). Bybit plans to recruit more than 100 employees in Austria to expand localized services. CEO Ben Zhou said that this move reflects Bybit's "compliance first" strategy, which will promote in-depth cooperation with EU regulators and strengthen consumer protection. It is reported that in order to promote expansion in the European market, Bybit will make large-scale investments in Austria and plans to recruit more than 100 professionals in Vienna to further provide more localized and compliant crypto services. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Ethereum News: Ethereum Price Surges to 3-Month High Amid ETF Inflows and Bullish Technicals
data.description: Why Is Ethereum (ETH) Price Up Today?Ethereum (ETH) surged over 4% in the last 24 hours, reaching a three-month high of $2,789. The rally outpaced the broader crypto market, supported by a combination of technical indicators, surging futures activity, and strong inflows into spot Ethereum ETFs.Bull Flag Breakout Suggests Potential Rally Toward $4KTechnical analysts point to the recent breakout from a bull flag pattern, a bullish continuation formation that typically precedes a sharp upside. The breakout was confirmed when ETH closed above $2,650 on May 27. Based on the flagpole’s height, the pattern sets a potential target near $4,000, implying a 46% rally from current levels.Record ETH Open Interest Signals Trader ConfidenceAccording to CoinGlass, Ether futures open interest (OI) hit an all-time high of $37.3 billion on May 29 — a 17% increase over the past five days. This uptick indicates that institutional and retail traders alike are positioning for further upside.Key exchanges contributing to the OI include Binance, Gate.io, Bybit, and Bitget (accounting for 51%), while the CME represents 8% of the market.Positive Funding Rates Reinforce Bullish SentimentFunding rates in ETH perpetual contracts have risen to 0.0090%, suggesting that more traders are betting long and are paying a premium to maintain those positions. Combined with rising OI, these metrics signal growing market optimism.ETF Inflows Add Fuel to Ethereum’s MomentumA major tailwind is continued inflows into Ethereum-focused exchange-traded funds (ETFs). According to SoSoValue, U.S.-based spot Ethereum ETFs saw $394.1 million in net inflows over the last eight days. BlackRock’s ETHA fund led the trend with $287.6 million added since May 14.Additional data from CoinShares reported $326.2 million in global ETH product inflows between May 19 and May 23, reflecting strong institutional demand.Outlook: ETH Eyes $4,000 As Technicals and Fundamentals AlignWith ETH breaking key resistance, supported by robust ETF inflows and futures positioning, analysts suggest the next target lies between $3,000 and $4,000. A bullish relative strength index (RSI) reading of 71 indicates upward momentum remains intact — though caution is advised as ETH approaches overbought territory.Ethereum is currently trading at $2,722, up 50% over the past month, with daily trading volume exceeding $26.5 billion.

data.title: U.S. Trade Delegation Scheduled to Visit India in June
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Indian officials have announced that a U.S. trade delegation will visit India from June 5 to June 6. The visit aims to strengthen trade relations between the two countries and discuss potential areas of cooperation.

data.title: James Wynn: Altcoin season won’t come before Bitcoin breaks all-time high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: James Wynn, the whale, posted on the X platform, "Unfortunately, the altcoin season will not come until Bitcoin breaks through its all-time high. Even if Bitcoin does break through, its current dominance means that the altcoin season may be greatly delayed. Most "Stud Parties" put 80% of their positions in altcoins. But you should put 99% in Bitcoin and leave the remaining 1% for Meme coins - because Meme coins outperform everything. This is a fact."

data.title: CapyBomb is now available on LINE
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bombie's new game CapyBomb announced that it has officially launched on the LINE platform. Players can log in to the game through the Dapp Portal from now on to receive additional welcome bonuses for new players. In addition, players who complete game tasks will have the opportunity to receive exclusive benefits such as KAIA token rewards.
Bombie said that this is an important ecological layout before Bombie TGE, aiming to reach more high-quality players through LINE's East Asian community penetration, accumulate real user assets for TGE, and promote the long-term value realization of BOMB in the game scene.

data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin is trading sideways, and IBIT and Deribit options markets show signs of expected pullback
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CoinDesk analyst Omkar Godbole wrote, "Bitcoin (BTC) has been moving basically sideways since it hit an all-time high of more than $110,000 last week. The weakening of the upward momentum is accompanied by signs that market participants' bullish sentiment on options related to the BlackRock Spot Bitcoin ETF (IBIT) is gradually weakening. This trend can be clearly seen from the one-year put-call option skew. The indicator reflects the market's pricing of volatility risk for put options (used for downside protection) relative to call options (representing bullish bets). A negative value for this indicator usually means that the market is bullish, while a positive value indicates that the market is worried about downside risks. IBIT's one-year option skewness has rebounded to near zero from a four-month low of -3.8 two weeks ago. This means that IBIT option traders are no longer actively betting on further increases through options. Perhaps they expect the market to pull back. Similar sentiments are also seen in the options market on the Deribit platform, according to Amberdata According to data from the CoinDesk website, short-term call options have weakened in skewness, meaning that the prices of call and put options expiring in the next two weeks are converging. " (CoinDesk)

data.title: Shiba Inu Price: Critical Chart Now Unlocks Potential Big Surge
data.description:
The Shiba Inu price teeters on a knife’s edge this week, as a critical chart pattern signals the digital coin might be about to break free from its slumber. A crypto analyst sees this setup as a tightly wound spring, potentially unlocking a significant, double-digit surge for the popular cryptocurrency, grabbing market attention. Shiba Inu ($SHIB) recently exhibited what chartists called a descending triangle, a formation that spoke of growing tension between buyers and sellers. This observation, highlighted by market analyst Ali Martinez (@ali_charts on X), suggested the Shiba Inu price could be gearing for a move of roughly 17%
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/05/29/shiba-inu-price-critical-chart-now-unlocks-potential-big-surge/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=shiba-inu-price-critical-chart-now-unlocks-potential-big-surge

data.title: BNB Chain launches exclusive incentive program for RWA projects
data.description: According to official news, BNB Chain announced the launch of an exclusive incentive program for RWA projects. This exclusive incentive provides tailored support for RWA projects that build or migrate to BNB Chain. Comprehensive support includes but is not limited to: technical and compliance guidance, liquidity seeds and TVL incentives, growth-focused financing and marketing, and customized scalable roadmaps. The program will be open for application from May 29, 2025. All RWA projects with the potential to be supported can join. Finally, BNB Chain will conduct rigorous evaluations and provide incentive support to high-quality RWA projects.

data.title: India and U.S. Trade Talks Progressing Smoothly, Says Official
data.description: According to PANews, India's Special Secretary of the Trade Department, Agarwal, announced on May 29 that trade negotiations between India and the United States are progressing well. He expressed optimism that positive outcomes are expected to be achieved soon.
